retrieved_result: Silicon Material This doping can be done by high temperature diffusion, where the wafers are placed in a furnace with the dopant introduced as a vapor. There are many other methods of doping silicon. In the manufacture of some thin film devices the introduction of dopants can occur during the deposition of the films
Decision_Reason: Retrieved result discusses silicon doping and semiconductor fabrication, not software development IDEs; not relevant to the query.
